title: Salty Fluffy Algerian Salt Cod Roast
description: A fragrant, lightly crisp roast salt cod with aromatic spices and a hint of citrus, perfect for a crowd-pleasing, halal-friendly Algerian dinner.

ingredients.name: salt cod fillets
ingredients.notes: soaked in cold water for 24 h, drained and pat dry

ingredients.name: sea salt
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp (optional, reduce if cod is very salty)

instructions: Squeeze the soaked cod fillets dry with paper towels, then place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, coriander, pepper, sea salt, lemon zest, and lemon juice.
Brush the spice mixture all over the cod fillets, making sure each piece is evenly coated.
Place the bay leaf on the baking sheet beside the fish; it will infuse subtle flavor during baking.
Bake uncovered for 15–18 minutes, or until the cod flakes easily with a fork and the exterior is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 2 minutes. Sprinkle freshly chopped parsley over the fillets.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side for squeezing.
Enjoy the airy, fluffy texture and the perfect balance of salty and citrusy notes.
